display_text: As a product manufacturer, do you intend to place this AI system on the EU market or put it into service as part of your product, under your own name or trademark?
hint_text: Under Article 25 and Recital 47, a product manufacturer who does this is treated as a provider of the embedded AI system. If your product is regulated under existing EU product safety law (Annex I Section A), the embedded AI may be a high-risk safety component. 'None of the above' means the AI is used only internally and not embedded in a product you release.

options.label: Yes — I place or intend to place this AI system on the market as part of my product under my own name or trademark
No — the AI system is not being placed on the market or into service as part of a product under my name
